from.body: # 1 John 2: Atoning Sacrifice ## NT Text — 1 John 2:1-2 If anyone sins we have an advocate with the Father, Jesus Christ the righteous. He is the propitiation for our sins — and for the whole world. ## OT Antecedents - **Lev 16** — Day of Atonement propitiation. - **Isa 53:10** — Soul an offering for sin. - **Ps 32:1-2** — Blessed is he whose sin is covered. ## Shared structure - Advocate - Propit…

to.title: Scapegoat Azazel
to.body: # Scapegoat into the Wilderness → Sin Borne Away ## OT Story — Leviticus 16:20-22 The high priest lays both hands on the live goat, confesses Israel's sins over it, and a fit man leads it to a solitary place. The goat bears all iniquities away. ## NT Fulfillment - John 1:29: The Lamb of God who takes away the sin of the world. - Isaiah 53:6: The LORD has laid on him the iniquity of us all. - Hebre…

from.title: Veil Of Temple Torn
from.body: # Veil of the Temple Torn ## NT Text — Matt 27:51 At Christ's death the temple veil tears top to bottom. The barrier between holy and most-holy is rent. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 26:31-33** — Veil separating holy from most-holy. - **Lev 16:2** — Aaron enters only on Day of Atonement. - **Isa 25:7** — He will destroy the covering. ## Shared structure - Top-down tearing - Sanctuary access - End of …

to.title: Words From Cross Finished
to.body: # Word from Cross: It Is Finished ## NT Text — John 19:30 Jesus cries 'tetelestai' — accomplished. The single word echoes Genesis 2's creation completion and Exodus 39's tabernacle completion. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 2:1-3** — Heavens and earth finished. - **Exod 39:32** — Work of tabernacle finished. - **Isa 53:11** — By his knowledge make many righteous. ## Shared structure - Completion declar…

from.title: Mountain Throughout Scripture
from.body: # Mountain Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — Heb 12; Matt 5; Rev 21 Mountains structure the canon: Eden's high garden, Moriah, Sinai, Zion, the Mount of Transfiguration, Mount of Olives, the heavenly Mount Zion. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 22** — Moriah. - **Exod 19** — Sinai. - **2 Sam 5:7** — Zion. - **Ezek 28:14** — Holy mountain of God. ## Shared structure - Ascent - Theophany - Covenant - Sacri…

to.title: Wedding Throughout Scripture
to.body: # Wedding Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 2; Rev 19 From Adam's awakening to Eve to Cana's water-turned-wine to the marriage supper of the Lamb, weddings mark new-creation thresholds. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 2:22-24** — First wedding. - **Song 3:11** — Day of Solomon's wedding. - **Isa 62:5** — Like a bridegroom rejoices. ## Shared structure - Anticipation - Feast - Joy - Covenant initiat…

from.title: Aarons Breastplate Twelve Stones
from.body: # Aaron's Breastplate of Twelve Stones → Christ Carries His People on His Heart ## OT Story — Exodus 28:15-30 The high priest's breastplate bears twelve gemstones, each engraved with a tribe's name, worn over his heart whenever he enters the holy place. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 4:14-16: A great high priest who sympathizes — boldness to draw near. - Hebrews 7:25: He always lives to intercede. - …

to.title: Jacobs Stone Pillow
to.body: # Jacob's Stone Pillow / Anointed Pillar → Christ the Cornerstone ## OT Story — Genesis 28:10-22 Fleeing alone, Jacob sleeps with a stone for a pillow and dreams of a ladder to heaven. Waking, he anoints the stone with oil, names the place Bethel ('house of God'), and vows. ## NT Fulfillment - John 1:51: Jesus to Nathanael — you will see heaven opened and angels ascending and descending on the Son…

from.title: Flight To Egypt
from.body: # Flight to Egypt ## NT Text — Matt 2:13-15 Joseph takes Mary and the child to Egypt to escape Herod. Israel's history is recapitulated: the Son goes down to Egypt as Israel did, in order to be called out as Israel was. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 46** — Jacob's family goes down to Egypt for refuge. - **Exod 4:19** — Moses told 'all who sought your life are dead' — quoted in Matt 2:20. - **Hos 11:1*…

to.title: Joseph In The Pit
to.body: # Joseph in the Pit → Descent and Deliverance ## OT Story — Genesis 37:18-24 The brothers strip Joseph of his ornate robe and cast him into an empty cistern in the wilderness. From the pit he is drawn up and sold into Egypt. ## NT Fulfillment - Psalm 88:6: 'You have put me in the depths of the pit' — lament that anticipates Christ's descent. - Acts 2:24: Death could not hold him. - Ephesians 4:9-1…

from.title: Revelation 19 Word Of God On White Horse
from.body: # Revelation 19: Word of God on a White Horse ## NT Text — Rev 19:11-16 Heaven opens; the rider on the white horse is called Faithful and True, the Word of God. He treads the winepress of God's wrath. ## OT Antecedents - **Isa 63:1-6** — Treading the winepress of wrath. - **Ps 2:9** — Rule with iron rod. - **Zech 14:3-4** — LORD goes forth to fight. ## Shared structure - Heaven opened - Faithful-T…

to.title: Revelation 20 Millennium
to.body: # Revelation 20: The Millennium ## NT Text — Rev 20:1-6 The dragon is bound; the saints reign with Christ a thousand years. A debated vision of the church-age or future kingdom. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 90:4** — Thousand years as one day. - **Isa 65:18-25** — Long-lived peaceful kingdom. - **Ezek 37:24-28** — David shepherd-king of restored Israel. ## Shared structure - Dragon bound - First resurr…

from.title: Apocalypse Of Weeks Enoch
from.body: # Apocalypse of Weeks → Periodized History and Final Age ## OT Story — 1 Enoch 93; 91:11-17 History is divided into ten 'weeks'; the seventh sees apostasy and the chosen of the eternal plant; later weeks bring judgment and new creation. ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 24:14: This gospel will be preached throughout the world, and then the end. - 2 Peter 3:13: New heavens and new earth. - Galatians 4:4:…

to.title: Jude Enoch Prophecy
to.body: # Jude: Enoch's Prophecy ## NT Text — Jude 14-15 Enoch prophesied of the Lord coming with thousands of holy ones to execute judgment. Jude cites the antediluvian patriarch as a witness to the parousia. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 5:21-24** — Enoch walked with God and was not. - **Deut 33:2** — LORD came with myriads of holy ones. - **Zech 14:5** — LORD comes with all the holy ones. ## Shared structu…

from.title: Psalm 118 Hosanna
from.body: # Psalm 118 / Hosanna → Triumphal Entry ## OT Story — Psalm 118:25-26 'Save us, we pray, O LORD! Blessed is he who comes in the name of the LORD!' Sung at pilgrimage feasts as Israel ascends to Jerusalem. ## NT Fulfillment - Matthew 21:9: 'Hosanna to the Son of David! Blessed is he who comes…' - John 12:13: Palm branches and the same cry. - Matthew 23:39: 'You will not see me again until you say…'…

to.title: Psalm 2 Anointed King
to.body: # Psalm 2 / 'You Are My Son' → Messiah Enthroned Despite Nations' Rage ## OT Story — Psalm 2 Nations rage and kings plot against the LORD and his anointed. The LORD laughs; he installs his King on Zion. 'You are my Son; today I have begotten you. Ask of me, and I will give the nations as your inheritance.' ## NT Fulfillment - Acts 4:25-28: Quoted as fulfilled in the plot against Jesus. - Acts 13:3…

from.title: 1 Cor 5 Christ Our Passover
from.body: # 1 Cor 5: Christ Our Passover ## NT Text — 1 Cor 5:7-8 Paul calls Christ 'our Passover lamb, sacrificed for us,' and exhorts cleansing of old leaven. Passover and Unleavened Bread become ethical patterns. ## OT Antecedents - **Exod 12** — Passover ordinance. - **Exod 13:6-7** — Unleavened bread for seven days. - **Deut 16:1-8** — Passover-Unleavened Bread combined. ## Shared structure - Lamb slai…

to.title: Hebrews 10 Sacrifices Cannot Take Away Sin
to.body: # Hebrews 10: Sacrifices Cannot Take Away Sin ## NT Text — Heb 10:1-14 The law's repeated sacrifices could never make worshippers perfect. Christ's single offering perfects forever those being sanctified. Psalm 40 is the controlling text. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 40:6-8** — Sacrifice and offering you did not desire — a body you prepared. - **Isa 1:11** — I have had enough of burnt offerings. - **1…

from.title: David Spares Saul
from.body: # David Spares Saul → Christ Forbearing With Persecutors ## OT Story — 1 Samuel 24, 26 Twice David could kill Saul who is hunting him. Egypt's firstborn die. ## NT Fulfillment - 1 Corinthians 5:7: Christ our Passover lamb has been sacrificed. - 1 Peter 1:18-19: Redeemed by the precious blood o…

to.body: # Sealing of the Stone ## NT Text — Matt 27:62-66 Pilate authorizes a guard and seal on the tomb. The precaution becomes evidence: theft cannot explain the empty tomb. ## OT Antecedents - **Dan 6:17** — Sealed lions' den. - **Lam 3:53** — Stone over the pit. - **Job 14:13** — Hide me in Sheol. ## Shared structure - Stone over opening - Official seal - Guard posted - Confinement of righteous ## The…

from.body: # Falling of Jerusalem ## The oracle Jesus weeps over Jerusalem and predicts that not one stone of the temple will be left on another; the city will be surrounded by armies and trampled by the Gentiles until their times are fulfilled. ## Date / context Passion week and earlier oracles in Luke, c. AD 30. ## Fulfillment Fulfilled in literal detail by Titus' siege in AD 70 — temple razed, city destro…

to.body: # New Jerusalem Descending ## The oracle John sees the holy city, New Jerusalem, coming down out of heaven from God, prepared as a bride; God dwells with humanity, every tear wiped away, no more death, mourning, or pain. ## Date / context Climax of Revelation; Ezekiel's temple vision is a major OT antecedent. ## Fulfillment Awaits consummation; foretasted in the church as the city set on a hill. #…

from.body: # Abraham / Isaac → The Crucifixion ## OT Story — Genesis 22 God commands Abraham: *"Take your son, your only son, whom you love — Isaac — and go to the region of Moriah. Sacrifice him there as a burnt offering on a mountain I will show you."* (Gen 22:2) Abraham obeys. Isaac carries the wood for his own sacrifice up the mountain. to.body: # Absalom Hangs in a Tree → Cursed One on the Tree ## OT Story — 2 Samuel 18:9-15 Absalom's hair catches in the branches of a great oak; he hangs between heaven and earth while his mule rides on. Joab pierces him with three darts. ## NT Fulfillment - Galatians 3:13: Cursed is everyone who hangs on a tree. - Deuteronomy 21:22-23: A hanged man is cursed by God. - John 19:34: Pierced in the side. ## …

from.body: # Psalm 22 → The Crucifixion ## OT Story — Psalm 22 A Davidic lament that pivots from extreme suffering to vindicated praise. The opening cry — *"My God, my God, why have you forsaken me?"* (22:1) — gives way to a sequence of concrete tortures: - *"All who see me mock me; they make mouths at me, they wag their heads"* (22:7) - *"He trusts in the LORD; let him deliver him!"* (22:8) — the mockers' t…

to.title: Empty Tomb
to.body: # Empty Tomb ## NT Text — Matt 28:6; John 20:6-7 The tomb is empty; grave-clothes remain. The body is raised, not stolen. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 16:10** — You will not abandon my soul to Sheol. - **Hos 6:2** — Third day he will raise us. - **Isa 53:10-11** — He shall see his offspring. ## Shared structure - Tomb opened - Linens left - No body - Angelic announcement ## Theological motif Three-day…

He bears the people's sorrow. ## NT Fulfillment - Luke 19:41-44: Jesus wept over Jerusalem. - Matthew 23:37-39: Lament over Jerusalem. - Lamentations 3:22-23: His mercie…

to.body: # Word from Cross: Eli Eli Lama Sabachthani ## NT Text — Matt 27:46; Mark 15:34 Jesus cries Psalm 22's opening. By invoking the incipit he invokes the whole psalm — its agony and its vindication. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 22:1** — Why have you forsaken me? - **Lam 1:12** — Is it nothing to you? - **Isa 53:10** — It pleased the LORD to crush him. ## Shared structure - Forsakenness expressed - Psalm …

from.body: # 1 John 5: Three That Testify ## NT Text — 1 John 5:6-9 There are three that testify: the Spirit, the water, and the blood. The triple witness confirms Jesus as Son of God. ## OT Antecedents - **Deut 19:15** — Two or three witnesses establish a matter. - **Num 35:30** — On the testimony of two witnesses a man shall die. - **Isa 43:10** — You are my witnesses, says the LORD. ## Shared structure - …

to.body: # Baptism of Jesus as Theophany ## NT Text — Matt 3:13-17; Mark 1:9-11; Luke 3:21-22 Jesus is baptized in the Jordan, the heavens open, the Spirit descends, and the Father speaks. The scene gathers OT theophanies and inaugurates the messianic ministry. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 1:2** — Spirit hovering over the waters — new-creation echo. - **Ps 2:7** — You are my Son — coronation formula. - **Isa …

from.body: # Threshing Floor of Boaz → Approaching the Redeemer in Boldness ## OT Story — Ruth 3 At Naomi's instruction, Ruth comes by night to the threshing floor where Boaz sleeps. She lies at his feet and asks him to spread his wing over her. He responds with covenant kindness. ## NT Fulfillment - Hebrews 4:16: Draw near with boldness to the throne of grace. - Romans 5:8: While we were yet sinners, Christ…

to.body: # Ezekiel 16 / Faithless Bride → Cleansed and Clothed ## OT Story — Ezekiel 16 Jerusalem is depicted as a newborn unwanted girl, washed and clothed by the LORD, made a queen. She plays the harlot. Yet he will atone and re-establish the covenant. ## NT Fulfillment - Ephesians 5:25-27: Christ gave himself to cleanse her by washing. - Revelation 19:7-8: The bride has made herself ready, granted fine …

Priests eat them weekly in the holy place. ## NT Fulfillment - John 6:35: I am the bread of life. - 1 Corinthians 10:17: We who are many are one bread, one body. - Mark 2:25-26: David's eating the showbread antici…

from.body: # Revelation 12: Woman Crowned with Stars ## NT Text — Rev 12:1-6 A woman clothed with the sun, crown of twelve stars, gives birth to a male child. Joseph's dream of celestial homage rises again, and Israel/the Messianic community is figured. ## OT Antecedents - **Gen 37:9-11** — Joseph's sun-moon-stars dream. - **Isa 66:7-9** — Zion's labor and birth. - **Mic 5:3** — Until she who is in travail b…

from.title: Garden Of Gethsemane As Eden Reversed
from.body: # Garden of Gethsemane as Eden Reversed ## NT Text — Matt 26:36-46; John 18:1 Jesus enters a garden to face the will of his Father. to.body: # Vine Throughout Scripture ## NT Text — John 15 Israel as vine in Psalm 80 and Isaiah 5 — disappointing fruit. Christ as the True Vine, with believers as branches abiding in him. ## OT Antecedents - **Ps 80:8-16** — Vine brought out of Egypt. - **Isa 5:1-7** — Vineyard of the LORD. - **Jer 2:21** — Choice vine turned degenerate. - **Hos 10:1** — Israel a luxuriant vine. ## Shared structure - Plan…

to.body: # Day of the LORD (Joel) ## The oracle The day of YHWH is great and very awesome — darkness, locust-army, cosmic upheaval — yet whoever calls on the name of YHWH shall be saved, and his Spirit will be poured out on all flesh. ## Date / context Joel, dating disputed (9th-5th c. from.body: # 1 John 1: Walk in the Light ## NT Text — 1 John 1:5-10 God is light; in him is no darkness.
